problem id: d8457e76
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(5) XOR SHR(2)

examples:
  00011010 -> 01000110
  01011011 -> 01110110
  11110111 -> 11011101
  00110110 -> 11001101
  10100011 -> 01001000
  00110101 -> 10101101
  01100101 -> 10111001
  11001100 -> 10110011
  11001110 -> 11110011
  11110101 -> 10011101

query: 01001000
predicted answer: 00010010
